title: Boom and Crash Interceptor EA
subtitle: Velocity Percentile + ATR Surge + SMA Trend Alignment for Spike Detection
author: Christian Benjamin (lynnchris)
verdict: HIGH EXTRACT — velocity percentile spike detection is a better VWV. ATR surge multiplier (ATR > prev_ATR × 1.5) is a new volatility expansion filter. VelocityPctile > 100 = extreme selectivity concept. Directly relevant to our Crash/Boom trading on Deriv.

core_concept.name: Boom/Crash Spike Detection via Velocity Percentile
core_concept.description: Compute price deltas over a rolling window (96 bars). Sort by magnitude. Flag a spike when |current_delta| > the (100-VelocityPctile) percentile of historical deltas. VelocityPctile=120 demands moves more extreme than ANY in the 96-bar history.
four_filters: SMA trend alignment (SMA rising for bull, falling for bear)
core_concept.relevance_to_creviaderiv: Crash/Boom indices are defined by spikes. Our VWV uses range_atr energy for synthetics. Adding velocity percentile threshold makes the filter adaptive — only fires on genuinely extreme moves, not just any above-average move.

velocity_percentile.formula: deltas = [abs(price[i] - price[i-1]) for i in range(window)]; deltas.sort(); threshold = deltas[int((100-pctile)/100 * len(deltas))]
velocity_percentile.VelocityPctile_120: Demands move > max(deltas in window) — only the most extreme spike triggers
velocity_percentile.recommendation: Use 95-100 for Boom/Crash (spike-only). Use 70-80 for general momentum detection.

atr_surge.meaning: Volatility must be expanding, not just elevated. Confirms the spike is happening NOW, not a residual from prior volatility.

VelocityPctile.description: Percentile threshold — > 100 = most extreme in window

keep: Velocity percentile approach: adaptive threshold vs fixed ATR multiplier
VelocityPctile > 100 concept: more extreme than any historical bar in window
ATR surge filter: current_ATR > prev_ATR × 1.5 (expanding volatility check)
discard: SMA as trend filter — use market_structure
Fixed session hours — use our SYMBOL_SCANNING_WINDOWS
improve: Replace VWV fixed threshold with velocity percentile for adaptive spike detection
Add ATR surge filter to VWV gate: VWV strong AND ATR expanding = double confirmation
VelocityPctile calibration: Crash/Boom use 95+, Volatility indices use 75, forex use 70

creviaderiv_vwv_upgrade.current_vwv: velocity = (close - open) / ATR; strong if > threshold
creviaderiv_vwv_upgrade.upgrade_with_percentile: deltas = rolling abs price changes; velocity_score = percentile_rank(|current_delta|, deltas); strong if velocity_score > 90th percentile
creviaderiv_vwv_upgrade.atr_surge_add: atr_expanding = atr[-1] > atr[-4] * 1.3  # ATR grew 30% in last 4 bars
creviaderiv_vwv_upgrade.combined: vwv_strong = velocity_score > 0.90 AND atr_expanding  # for Crash/Boom
